title: Swan SF17010N 1.5 Litre Slow Cooker with 3 Heat Settings, Glass Lid, 120W, Stainless Steel, Silver
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: THREE COOKING SETTINGS: With 3 different temperature settings, high, low, and auto you can gently simmer your food over an extended period on low, or switch to high and cook in half the time
1.5L CAPACITY: Compact 1.5L Capacity for One or Two: Ideal for individuals, students or couples who want homemade meals in manageable portions without the waste
REMOVABLE/ POT: The pot is removable from the slow cooker making it easy and quick to clean, ready to use again
RECIPE BOOK: Contains a 32 page recipe book full of slow cooker recipes for the whole family
2 YEAR GUARANTEE: Comes with a 2-year manufacturer guarantee, protecting you from any issues you find
description: From the manufacturer With a strong British heritage dating back to the 1920s, Swan understands that the kitchen is the heart of home life. It’s where delicious meals are made and memories are created. Iconic Cookware and Appliances Affordable Dream Kitchens 100 Years of British Heritage Stylish Design and Outstanding Performance 6.5 litre Slow Cooker allows you to prepare and cook meals in advance It's ideal for stews, curries, casseroles or even slow cooking meats to make them extra tender. The cooker also features a glass lid as well as a keep warm function making it great for dinner parties or larger events. There is also a removable ceramic pot, perfect for serving meals at the table. Cook a range of healthy and delicious stews, casseroles, curries and soups for larger family gatherings Contains a 32 page recipe book full of slow cooker recipes for the whole family THREE COOKING SETTINGS With 3 different temperature settings, high, low, and auto you can gently simmer your food over an extended period on low, or switch to high and cook in half the time REMOVABLE/ POT The pot is removable from the slow cooker making it easy and quick to clean, ready to use again KEEP WARM FUNCTION An innovative keep warm function keeps your meal at the perfect temperature for serving
